shopItems.name: Cyber Pulse Blade
shopItems.description: A high-frequency vibration blade infused with cosmic energy. Deals massive damage to digital constructs.

shopItems.name: Aegis Hex-Shield
shopItems.description: Deployable hexagonal barrier that absorbs incoming projectile energy and converts it to heat.

shopItems.name: Singularity Core
shopItems.description: A contained miniature black hole that provides endless power to advanced tech modules.
